name: skills-toolkit
description: A small toolkit of two Claude skills for building and querying a skills-guide.yaml knowledge base: skills-auditor (generate/update/validate the guide) and skill-selector (route prompts to the right skills using the guide).

plugins.name: skills-auditor
plugins.description: Create, maintain, and validate a skills-guide.yaml knowledge base that maps installed skills to categories and tasks.

plugins.name: skill-selector
plugins.description: Break down a prompt into ordered tasks and assign the best-fit skills, using skills-guide.yaml as the source of truth when present.
